## 👋 Welcome!
This is a great task for someone new to the project! Don't worry if you're not sure how to start - we're here to help.

## 📋 Task Description
Clear description of what needs to be done.

## 🎯 Goal
What should be accomplished when this task is complete?

## 📝 Steps to Complete
1. Read [BEGINNER_GUIDE.md](../../BEGINNER_GUIDE.md) if you haven't already
2. Create a new branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name`
3. Make the changes (see details below)
4. Test your changes in the browser
5. Commit and push your changes
6. Create a Pull Request
